tutorialWelcomeDesc.message: Let us show you around. We'll walk through the main features step by step.

tutorialAddEventDesc.message: Tap this button to create a new local event. You can set a title, time, and recurrence options.

tutorialDateNavDesc.message: Use the arrows to move between days. Click the date to open a calendar picker for quick navigation.

tutorialSyncDesc.message: Fetch and update your Google Calendar events. Available when Google Calendar is connected.

tutorialSettingsDesc.message: Customize work hours, colors, language, and Google Calendar integration in the settings page.

tutorialTimelineDesc.message: Your daily schedule is displayed on a 24-hour timeline. The red line marks the current time.

tutorialMemoDesc.message: Use the memo panel at the bottom to jot down quick notes. It saves automatically and persists across sessions. You can enable Markdown rendering in Settings.

tutorialFinishDesc.message: That covers the basics. Enjoy using SideTimeTable!
